use_cases: Decorative section titles with geometric corner framing
Hero text with scramble animation effect
Feature labels or callouts with bordered framing
Stylized headings requiring subtle frame accents
Interactive-free animated text reveals in landing pages
ai_summary: A corner-framed text component that renders text content with a geometric border effect created using CSS linear gradients. The component uses a TextScramble effect for text animation and features minimalist styling with customizable corner frame borders. Suitable for hero sections, section titles, and decorative headings in modern web applications.
